github_actions.title: GitHub Actions Pipeline

stages.name: Regression Analysis
stages.description: Map changed files to impacted test suites

stages.name: Run QA Tests
stages.description: pytest with HTML report + screenshot on failure

stages.name: Publish Reports
stages.description: Upload HTML report as artifact (30-day retention)

stages.name: Publish Screenshots
stages.description: Upload failure screenshots on test failure

stages.name: Notify
stages.description: Simulate Jira bug creation on failure

github_actions.key_yaml:
on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop, feature/**]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      test_suite:
        type: choice
        options: [all, registration, forgot_password]
      break_locators:
        type: boolean

azure_devops.title: Azure DevOps Pipeline

stages.name: Test Stage
stages.description: Start app, analyze regression, execute tests

stages.name: PublishTestResults
stages.description: Push JUnit XML to ADO Test Plans automatically

stages.name: PublishPipelineArtifact
stages.description: Publish HTML report, screenshots, healing log

stages.name: Report Stage
stages.description: Notify teams, simulate Jira bug filing

azure_devops.key_yaml:
- task: PublishTestResults@2
  inputs:
    testResultsFormat: 'JUnit'
    testResultsFiles: 'qa_framework/reports/*.xml'
    failTaskOnFailedTests: false

- task: PublishPipelineArtifact@1
  inputs:
    targetPath: 'qa_framework/reports/html/report.html'
    artifact: 'HTMLTestReport'

jira_integration.title: Jira Integration Flow

steps.detail: pytest exit code != 0 in CI pipeline
Test name, failure message, branch, commit SHA, screenshot path
Auto-populated: Summary, Description, Priority (based on risk score), Labels (branch + 'automated'), Screenshot attachment
Jira sends email + Slack webhook to QA channel
Triage and assign to developer. Link to CI run artifacts.
